# Screenshot Matrix

Every shot captured for this project. Used by the visual red-team and the ship gate. The `project_ship_check.py` requires `desktop`, `mobile`, and `reduced` to appear in this file.

## Capture method

- Tool: <FILL IN — Playwright / Puppeteer / manual / Polypane>
- Command: <FILL IN — e.g. `npm run screenshots`>
- Storage: <FILL IN — `docs/screenshots/` or `workspace/<slug>/screenshots/`>
- Capture date: <FILL IN>

## Mandatory shots

- [ ] Hero, desktop, light state (and dark if applicable).
- [ ] Hero, mobile (390px).
- [ ] Hero, reduced-motion.
- [ ] Signature interaction in its strongest mid-state, desktop.
- [ ] Signature interaction equivalent on mobile.
- [ ] Footer, desktop and mobile.
- [ ] Any sub-page mentioned in IA.
- [ ] 3D / WebGL canvas frame, if applicable.
- [ ] 3D poster fallback frame, if applicable.
